pandocultimateconverter-desc: File-tae-airticle conversion option durin the uplaid process
pandocultimateconverter-summary: File-tae-airticle conversion option durin the uplaid process
pandocultimateconverter-warning-page-nam: The airticle title is either ower short or ower lang. Lenth is restrictit tae atween $1 an $2 chairacters.
The airticle title contains invalid chairacters o the follaein: $1.
pandocultimateconverter-warning-file-not: Please select a file tae uplaid
pandocultimateconverter-conversion-compl: Conversion complete, file is automatically deletit
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-d: Please specify file an target page name. Gin the page awready exists, its content will be owerwritten.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-f: Chuise whit ye want tae convert tae a wiki page
pandocultimateconverter-special-page-pla: Type in the title for the airticle creatit here. Existin airticle will be owerwritten.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-t: Target page name (will be owerwritten gin it exists)
pandocultimateconverter-error-filetype-b: The file type $1 isna alloued on this wiki. Ye can fix it bi addin this line tae LocalSettings.php: '$2wgFileExtensions[] = "$1";'
pandocultimateconverter-error-uploaddisa: Uplaidin is disabled on the wiki. Enable it bi addin '$wgEnableUploads = true;' tae LocalSettings.php
pandocultimateconverter-error-mustbelogg: Anly loggit-in uisers can uplaid files on this wiki. Please log in tae proceed.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-invalid: Anly http an https URLs are supportit.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-pageexi: The target page awready exists. Pass forceoverwrite=1 tae owerwrite it.
apihelp-pandocconvert-summary: Convert an uplaidit file or URL tae a wiki page uisin Pandoc.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-pagename: Target wiki page title. Existin content will be owerwritten whan forceoverwrite is set.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-filename: Name o an awready-uplaidit file in the wiki repository (e.g. "Document.docx"). Mutually exclusive wi 'url'.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-url: Remote http/https URL tae fetch an convert. Mutually exclusive wi 'filename'.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-forceoverwri: Gin set, owerwrite the target page gin it awready exists.
apihelp-pandocconvert-example-file: Convert an awready-uplaidit file named Document.docx tae the page MyArticle.
apihelp-pandocconvert-example-url: Convert the content at https://example.com tae the page MyArticle.
apihelp-pandocllmpolish-summary: Rin LLM AI cleanup on the wikitext o an existin wiki page.
apihelp-pandocllmpolish-param-pagename: Title o the existin wiki page tae polish.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-descriptio: Add files or URLs tae convert intae wiki pages. Ye can process multiple items at aince.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-dropzone-t: Drap files here or click tae brouse
pandocultimateconverter-codex-dropzone-h: Supportit formats: PDF, DOCX, ODT, HTML, EPUB, an ithers supportit bi Pandoc
pandocultimateconverter-codex-queue-over: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|page awready exists|pages awready exist}} an will be owerwritten
pandocultimateconverter-codex-page-exist: This page awready exists an will be owerwritten
apierror-pandocllmpolish-notconfigured: LLM polish isna configured on this wiki.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-navigate-w: Conversion is in progress. Are ye sure ye want tae lea?
pandocultimateconverter-codex-invalid-ur: Invalid URL (anly http an https are supportit)
pandocexport-summary: Export wiki pages tae external document formats (DOCX, ODT, EPUB, an mair) uisin Pandoc.
pandocultimateconverter-export-descripti: Add pages or categories tae export, chuise a format, then click Export. Categories will include aw thair pages an subcategories.
pandocultimateconverter-export-page-plac: Sairch for a page or category…
pandocultimateconverter-export-page-not-: This page or category disna exist.
pandocultimateconverter-export-error-no-: Please add at least ane page or category tae export.
pandocultimateconverter-export-error-inv: The requestit export format isna supportit.
pandocultimateconverter-export-separate-: Dounlaid separate file for ilka page (ZIP archive)
